user.title: Set up iRV32 Stereo
user.description:
Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of the iRV32V2 stereo. The stereo must be in BLE range of the Home Assistant host or a connected Bluetooth proxy.

Example: {example_mac}

data_description.address: Six pairs of hex digits separated by colons or hyphens, e.g. DE:D4:34:53:37:B5

error.invalid_mac: Not a valid MAC address. Use the format AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF.

abort.already_configured: This iRV32 stereo is already configured.
